expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates all three required focus areas under “Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement — required focus coverage (advisory)”: “A. Shipment checkpoint: hyperlink styling distinguishes link vs. non-link”, “B. Contextual navigation behavior from shipment checkpoint”, and “C. Fallback rendering safety (non-hyperlink / missing data / safe rendering)”, each with intent, evidence needed, and pass/fail rules.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 5b Checkpoint Review (Advisory)” and states “Primary phase under test: phase5b”. It also includes a dedicated “Phase alignment: phase5b deliverable expectations” section and provides a phase5b outcome (“Overall phase5b checkpoint status…: BLOCKED — no admissible evidence provided”), which is consistent with blind_pre_defect evidence gating.
